original_statement: what is the total number of films he has made?
mutated_statement: what is the total number of things he has done?
mutation_analysis: 名词泛化 + 动词泛化: "films" 被替换为模糊泛指 "things" | "has made" → "has done"（films→things | has made→has done）

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据agent的执行日志与judge_thought可见关键证据：agent的chain中thought写道“The table lists 15 films (one per row). Counting all the rows gives a total of 15 things he has done.”，judge_thought也重复“The table lists 15 entries (films) ... Counting all rows yields a total of 15 works”。从这些陈述可见，agent直接将模糊的“things”理解为原始的“films”，没有在任何地方提及问题模糊性、歧义或请求澄清。agent直接按自己的理解计数并给出具体答案15，未表现出不确定性、澄清询问或多种可能解的讨论，因此应归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
